createGame.title: Create Game
createGame.multiCourtHint: Select up to {{count}} courts for {{participants}} players ({{selected}} selected)
createGame.webCameraHint: This court has a linked web camera
createGame.clubCancellationNotice: Cancellation notice: at least {{hours}} hours before your slot.
createGame.priceRequired: Price must be greater than 0 for this price type
createGame.gameTypeNote: You can change detailed game settings in the Game Setup section.
createGame.gameTypeNoteLeague: You can change detailed league settings in the League Setup section.

note.true: Any participant can invite other players.

noteTraining.true: Any participant can invite other participants.

note.false: Will be private and only visible to invited participants.
note.true: Will be visible to all players and can be found in the search.

noteTraining.false: Will be private and only visible to invited participants.
noteTraining.true: Will be visible to all players and can be found in the search.

note.false: Only organizers can enter and modify results and game format.
note.true: Any playing participant can enter results and change the game format.

note.false: Players need approval from organizers before joining.
note.true: Players can join directly without waiting for approval.

noteTraining.false: Participants need approval from organizers before joining.
noteTraining.true: Participants can join directly without waiting for approval.

afterGameGoToBar.title: Stay at the bar after the game
afterGameGoToBar.titleTraining: Stay at the bar after the training

note.false: Does not include a social gathering after the match.
note.true: Includes a social gathering after the match.

noteTraining.false: Does not include a social gathering after the training.
noteTraining.true: Includes a social gathering after the training.

note.false: Scoreboard is individual. Players will play with anyone based on rules.
note.true: Scoreboard is by pair. You can lock players into pairs that compete against each other. Pair lineups cannot be changed after the game starts.

note.false: Results will not affect participants' levels.

note.mixPairs: Only for team playing, each team will consist of 1 man, 1 woman, equal number of men/women will be allowed to join.

GAME.descriptionOn: Keep the same partner for every match in this game.
GAME.descriptionOff: Partners can change from round to round.

TOURNAMENT.descriptionOn: Partners stay together for the entire tournament.
TOURNAMENT.descriptionOff: Pairs may change between tournament rounds.

LEAGUE.descriptionOn: Fixed pairs for the whole league.
LEAGUE.descriptionOff: Pairs may change from round to round in the league.

allowUserInMultipleTeams.title: Same player on multiple fixed teams
allowUserInMultipleTeams.helper: Allows one person to be selected on more than one pair. Rotation and some league or standings logic may count them in unusual ways; turn off fixed teams to reset this.
allowUserInMultipleTeams.editInSettingsHint: You are editing Settings in the card below. Use the switch there for this option, then tap Save. When you leave edit mode, you can change it again from Game setup above.
allowUserInMultipleTeams.tapEditHint: Tap Edit on this card, then turn the switch and tap Save.
allowUserInMultipleTeams.saveAfterChangeHint: Turn the switch, then tap Save (top or bottom of this card). Your Game setup card shows this option again after you finish editing.

note.false: Each player can only be on one fixed pair.
note.true: A player may appear on several fixed pairs at once.

createGame.invitesWillBeSent_one: Player will be invited after game creation
createGame.invitesWillBeSent_other: {{count}} players will be invited after game creation
createGame.overlapHardSave: This time overlaps a court that is unavailable (club system or blocked). Choose another slot.
createGame.overlapSoftMessage: Another player has a game on this court at this time but has not confirmed the booking yet. You can still continue.
createGame.markCourtBookedMessage: You selected a court but have not marked it as booked. Confirm when you have reserved it with the club.

locationTime.tabSubtitleTimeSlots: Book court when you create the game
locationTime.tabSubtitleTimeSlotsEdit: Book court when you save changes
locationTime.tabSubtitleBookingsEdit: Link court reservations to this game
locationTime.realCourtBookingHint: {{courts}} at {{club}} will be reserved when you create the game.
locationTime.realCourtBookingHintEdit: {{courts}} at {{club}} will be reserved when you save.
locationTime.skipRealCourtHint: Only the game will be created — no court reservation with the club.
locationTime.skipRealCourtHintEdit: Only the game will be updated — no court reservation with the club.
locationTime.emptyBookings: No upcoming reservations at this club
locationTime.overrideHint: Game time can be shorter than your reservation
locationTime.tabSwitchDiscardBody: Switching tabs will clear your current selection.
locationTime.unlinkLastConfirm: Removing the last reservation will unlock time editing.
locationTime.unlinkNoCancelNote: The court reservation at the club stays active — only the link to this game is removed.
locationTime.syncInactiveCreate: Sync isn't active right now — we couldn't retrieve slots or make bookings here. You can still create the game at this time.
locationTime.syncInactiveEdit: Sync isn't active right now — we couldn't retrieve slots or make bookings here. You can still edit the game at this time.

booktime.switchLabel: Reserve court when I create the game
booktime.switchHint: We'll reserve {{court}} at {{club}} when you create the game.
booktime.authTitle: Sign in to see available times
booktime.authHint: Sign in to {{club}} to pick a time for your game.
booktime.dateHint: You can book up to {{days}} days ahead at this club.
booktime.multiBookFailed: Could not reserve {{court}}. Previous reservations were released.
booktime.slotTaken: This slot was just taken—pick another time.
booktime.sessionExpired: Your sign-in expired. Please sign in again and retry.
booktime.createFailedAfterBook: We couldn't create your game. The court reservation was cancelled—try again.
booktime.createFailedRollback: We couldn't create your game. We couldn't confirm the court reservation was cancelled—check with the club.
booktime.bookFailed: Could not reserve the court. Try again.
booktime.cancelPolicy: Free cancellation up to {{hours}} hours before start.
booktime.snapshotBlocked: Live availability isn't synced yet. Wait for sync or pick another day.
booktime.alreadyReserved: Court already reserved for this game.
booktime.liveApiUnavailable: Court reservation isn't available right now — using normal scheduling.

intent.title: What kind of game?
intent.noTemplatesForSetup: No preset fits this setup — use Advanced to pick a format manually.

social.description: Club night, rotation, no rating pressure

match.description: Standard rules, counts toward your level
